Upload a resume. Paste a job description. Get a Bayesian-calibrated skill profile with adaptive diagnostics, temporal decay modeling, and a personalized learning roadmap.

Hackathon 2026 Built with React · FastAPI · Claude Sonnet 4 · D3.js · Chart.js

The Problem

Resumes lie. Skill assessments don't adapt.

Traditional hiring tools rely on keyword matching — they can't tell if a candidate actually knows Python or just listed it on their resume 5 years ago. Skills decay over time, but no tool accounts for this.

Existing skill assessment platforms ask the same questions regardless of your level. They waste your time on things you already know and miss the gaps that matter.

SkillPrint AI solves this by combining:

✦ Exponential temporal decay modeling (skills fade over time)
✦ Bayesian Knowledge Tracing (adaptive mastery estimation)
✦ Claude Sonnet 4 adaptive questioning (difficulty adjusts in real-time)
✦ Personalized learning DAG with course recommendations

❌ Traditional Approach

Keyword matching → Static tests → Generic advice

No decay modeling · No adaption · No learning path

✅ SkillPrint AI Approach

Resume parsing → Decay modeling → Adaptive BKT diagnostics → Personalized DAG

Real proficiency · Adversarial probing · Course recommendations

How It Works

Five-Layer Analysis Pipeline

01

Extract

AI parses resume + JD. Maps every skill with confidence scores and timestamps.

02

Decay

Exponential decay: Cdecayed = Craw × e−λt. λ=0.15, t=years since last use.

03

Diagnose

Claude Sonnet 4 generates adversarial questions. Difficulty adapts to your level in real-time.

04

Trace

BKT updates mastery after each answer: P(M|correct) = P(M)×(1−Pslip) / P(correct).

05

Path

Personalized DAG maps optimal learning route. Course recommendations with time estimates.

Key Features

What Makes SkillPrint AI Different

📊 Temporal Decay Modeling

Skills erode without practice. Our exponential decay model (λ=0.15) recalculates real proficiency based on years since last use. A Python skill from 4 years ago is worth 45% less.

🧠 Bayesian Knowledge Tracing

4-parameter BKT model (P(L₀), P(T), P(S), P(G)) updates mastery probability after each diagnostic answer, giving a statistically calibrated estimate of true knowledge depth.

💬 Claude Sonnet 4 Adaptive Q&A

No generic quizzes. Claude generates adversarial, skill-specific questions that probe edge cases. If you claim Python expertise, it asks about metaclasses, not print statements.

🕸️ Learning Path DAG

D3.js force-directed graph with prerequisite edges. Click any node to see gap details, reasoning, and curated course links from Coursera, Udemy, and Fast.ai.

📋 Learning Roadmap & Courses

Priority-ordered skill improvement list with progress bars, estimated hours, and specific online course recommendations. Toggle between graph and roadmap views.

📥 Downloadable Report

Export your complete analysis as a formatted report: match score, skill breakdown, diagnostic log, BKT transitions, and recommended focus areas with time estimates.

🧪 Real-World Sandbox

Realistic scenario-based evaluation. Claude evaluates your approach to an actual engineering problem and provides scores, strengths, and specific improvement areas.

📈 Visual Radar Analysis

Chart.js radar plot overlays your mastery against job requirements. Instantly see where gaps exist with color-coded severity badges (critical, high, medium, low).

Technology Stack

Built With Modern, Production-Ready Tools

LayerTechnologyWhy
FrontendReact 18 ViteFast HMR, component-based UI
StylingTailwindCSS 4Utility-first, designed system
StateZustandLighweight, no boilerplate
ChartsChart.js D3.jsRadar charts + force graph
AnimationFramer MotionPhysics-based animations
BackendFastAPI PythonAsync, typed, fast
AI EngineClaude Sonnet 4Adversarial questioning, evaluation
PDF ParsePyMuPDFResume extraction
DeployVercel RenderZero-config, global CDN
# Temporal Decay Model
def apply_decay(confidence, years_since):
  lambda_ = 0.15
  return confidence * exp(-lambda_ * years_since)

# Bayesian Knowledge Tracing
def bkt_update(prior, correct, p_slip, p_guess):
  if correct:
    p_correct = prior * (1 - p_slip) + (1 - prior) * p_guess
    posterior = prior * (1 - p_slip) / p_correct
  else:
    p_wrong = prior * p_slip + (1 - prior) * (1 - p_guess)
    posterior = prior * p_slip / p_wrong
  return posterior

Deployment Architecture

1 GitHub Repo
→
2 /frontend → Vercel
→
3 /backend → Render

Application Pages

5 Purpose-Built Pages

🏠 Landing Page

Input: Resume PDF upload + Job Description paste

Output: Parsed skills with confidence scores + temporal decay applied

Design: Asymmetric hero, cycling typewriter, morphing blob, 5-step process cards, algorithm formulas, tech marquee

💬 Diagnostic Page

Input: User answers to adaptive questions

Output: BKT-calibrated mastery probabilities per skill

Design: Split layout — skill sidebar with decay bars + chat interface with BKT toast notifications

📊 Results Page

Input: All analysis data (parse + BKT + decay)

Output: 5-metric dashboard, radar chart, key findings, skill-by-skill breakdown, downloadable report

Design: Metric cards, asymmetric radar + analysis, color-coded gap badges

🕸️ Learning Path Page

Input: Gap analysis + skill prerequisites

Output: Interactive D3 DAG + priority-ordered roadmap with course recommendations

Design: Zoomable/draggable graph, node inspector drawer, roadmap toggle with curated courses

🧪 Sandbox Page

Input: User's approach to a realistic engineering scenario

Output: Claude-evaluated score, strengths, improvement areas, streaming feedback

Design: 2-column layout — scenario + response on left, score ring + assessment on right

User Flow

From Upload to Actionable Insights

01 Upload Resume
→
02 Paste JD
→
03 AI Parses
→
04 Decay Applied
→
05 Diagnostic Q&A
06 BKT Calibrates
→
07 Results + Radar
→
08 Download Report
→
09 Learning Path
→
10 Sandbox Eval

Why We Win

Competitive Differentiators

e⁻λt

Temporal Decay

No other tool accounts for skill degradation over time. Our exponential model gives accurate current proficiency.

BKT

Bayesian Tracing

Statistical mastery estimation, not multiple-choice quizzes. Every answer updates your probability model.

DAG

Learning Graph

Not a flat list — a directed acyclic graph with prerequisite edges and curated course recommendations.

Innovation Summary

FeatureTraditional ToolsSkillPrint AI
Skill AssessmentKeyword matchingAI parsing + temporal decay
DiagnosticsStatic multiple-choiceClaude Sonnet 4 adaptive questioning
Mastery EstimationPass/fail score4-parameter BKT probability
Skill DecayNot consideredExponential decay (λ=0.15)
Learning PathGeneric course listPersonalized DAG with prerequisites
ReportBasic PDFDetailed analysis with BKT log + recommendations
Practical EvalNoneReal-world scenario sandbox
